sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value String, money Decimal(10, 2), timestamp DateTime);
SELECT id, accurateCastOrNull(value, 'Decimal(10, 2)') AS casted_value FROM test_table WHERE accurateCastOrNull(value, 'Decimal(10, 2)') IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, accurateCastOrNull(value, 'UInt8') AS uint8_value FROM test_table WHERE (CASE WHEN accurateCastOrNull(value, 'UInt8') IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1;
SELECT id, (x -> accurateCastOrNull(x, 'Int32'))(value) AS int32_value FROM test_table;
SELECT id, accurateCastOrNull((x -> x + 1)(toUInt32(id)), 'UInt8') AS adjusted_id FROM test_table;
SELECT id, accurateCastOrNull(NULL, 'UInt16') AS null_cast, (x -> accurateCastOrNull(x, 'String'))(money) AS money_str FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING id > 1;
SELECT id, (x -> accurateCastOrNull(x, 'DateTime'))(timestamp) AS nullable_timestamp FROM test_table ORDER BY id ASC;

SELECT id, (x -> (accurateCastOrNull(x, 'UInt8') * 2))(value) AS computed_value FROM (SELECT id, accurateCastOrNull(value, 'UInt8') AS valid_value FROM test_table) GROUP BY id HAVING valid_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, accurateCastOrNull(value, 'FixedString(5)') AS fixed_value FROM test_table WHERE accurateCastOrNull(value, 'FixedString(5)') IS NOT NULL AND fixed_value != '     ';
